description_long: This is a tall, rectangular mirror with a dark wooden frame that features a subtle wood grain texture. The frame is relatively thin and has a minimalist, modern design with clean, straight edges and no decorative embellishments. The reflective surface occupies nearly the entire front face, bordered by the wooden frame. The back and sides of the mirror are fully enclosed in the same dark wood material, giving it a solid and cohesive appearance. The mirror is likely intended for wall mounting, suitable for both residential and commercial urban environments. Its size and style make it ideal for use in entryways, hallways, or other transitional spaces.
description: A tall, rectangular mirror with a dark wood frame and minimalist design, featuring a large reflective surface. The frame is thin, modern, and fully encloses the mirror on all sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, uninterrupted reflective surface bordered by a thin, dark wooden frame.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile of the mirror and the thickness of the wooden frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full wooden backing with visible wood grain texture and no reflective surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim, rectangular profile and frame thickness.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, thin, dark wood frame with visible wood grain and minimalist styling.
